context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Discomfort state triggered when cage has 3 or more poop objects on floor
context.screen_position: Center at x=64px, y=60px on perch
adjacent_elements: poop (multiple instances on floor at y=110-125px)
context.usage_scenario: Automatically triggered when poop count reaches 3+. Echo shows discomfort through body language. Dust particles appear around Echo. Player must clean cage floor by swiping to remove poop and return Echo to idle state.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with hunched posture, body slightly compressed. Crest flattened against head showing discomfort. Head slightly lowered. Overall appearance is more compact and uncomfortable than idle state.
visual_specification.texture: Pure pixel art with slightly ruffled appearance

animation.description: Frame 1: Hunched posture, crest flat. Frame 2: Slight shift to left, subtle discomfort movement. Frame 3: Slight shift to right. Subtle fidgeting animation showing Echo is uncomfortable.

visual_specification.details: Crest flattened to 1-2px height (vs 3-5px normal). Body compressed by 2-3px vertically. Head lowered by 2-3px. Eyes half-closed (1x2px instead of 2x2px) showing discomfort. Dust particles (1x1px, #C2C3C7) appear around Echo at 3-5 locations, slowly drifting. Body shifts 1-2px left/right between frames.

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: Unlike idle: hunched posture, flattened crest, half-closed eyes, compressed body. Unlike sleeping: eyes partially visible, upright on perch. Unlike happy: no raised crest, no energetic movement, negative emotion.

explicit_negations: No visible dirt on Echo's body (dust is separate particles)
